name: Beet Appetizer Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the ends of the beets.
2. Wash well and cook in boiling salted water until tender.
3. Drain and remove skins under running cold water.
4. Dice the beets.
5. Mix together the dressing ingredients.
6. Combine the beets, onion, tomato, garlic, cilantro, and parsley in a salad bowl.
7. Pour over half the dressing and toss gently.
8. Chill for 30 minutes.
9. Slice the potatoes and place in a shallow bowl. Toss with remaining dressing.
10. Chill.
11. When ready to serve, arrange beets, tomato, and onion in the center of a shallow bowl.
12. Arrange potatoes in a ring around them.
13. Garnish with olives.
